description_long: This is a large bird with a striking white head and tail, contrasting sharply with its dark brown body and wings. The wings are broad and long, with distinct finger-like primary feathers at the tips, and the underparts of the wings show lighter feathering near the base. The beak is large, hooked, and bright yellow, well-adapted for tearing flesh. The legs are featherless and yellow, ending in strong talons. The bird's eyes are forward-facing and intense, set in a white-feathered head. The overall appearance is powerful and majestic, with a streamlined body built for soaring flight.
description: A large, powerful bird with a white head and tail, dark brown wings and body, and a hooked yellow beak. Its broad wings and strong talons give it a commanding presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white head, yellow beak, and outstretched dark wings with fingered tips.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hooked yellow beak, white head, and the full span of one wing with visible feather detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white tail, dark brown back, and the full width of the outstretched wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the head, beak, and the extended wing with detailed feathering.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid dark brown body and wings with a sharply contrasting white head and tail; wings show subtle lighter feathering near the base.
